name: Queen of Darkness
overview: After a car accident leaves heiress Ye Ying with amnesia, she is mistaken for a housewife named An Ning and forced to live with a family she doesn’t know. Relying on instinct to survive, she grows drawn to inspector Huo Xiao, even as secrets and deception surround them. As her memories return, Ye Ying must choose between the safety of her false life and the dangerous truth waiting to be uncovered.
